# Agent Website Design Skills

Open-source AI agent skills for website design, landing pages, design systems, responsive UI QA, conversion polish, and accessibility.

Repository: https://github.com/divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills
Catalog: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills/main/skills.json
README: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills/main/README.md
Agent instructions: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills/main/AGENTS.md

## Install

Use the Agent Skills CLI when available:

```bash
npx skills add divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills
```

Or fetch individual raw SKILL.md files listed below.

## Skills

- web-visual-direction: Create strong visual direction for websites and web apps. Use for mood, layout language, typography, palette, imagery, art direction, motion feel, and first-screen impression.
  - Skill file: web-visual-direction/SKILL.md
  - Raw: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills/main/web-visual-direction/SKILL.md

- web-design-system: Create or refine practical website design systems. Use for tokens, component rules, responsive constraints, interaction states, and accessibility defaults.
  - Skill file: web-design-system/SKILL.md
  - Raw: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills/main/web-design-system/SKILL.md

- landing-page-craft: Design and implement high-quality landing pages and marketing websites. Use for homepages, product pages, launch pages, pricing pages, waitlists, and conversion-focused website flows.
  - Skill file: landing-page-craft/SKILL.md
  - Raw: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills/main/landing-page-craft/SKILL.md

- responsive-ui-qa: Verify and fix responsive website UI quality. Use for desktop/mobile QA, overflow, overlap, blank canvases, broken navigation, unstable grids, and viewport-specific regressions.
  - Skill file: responsive-ui-qa/SKILL.md
  - Raw: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills/main/responsive-ui-qa/SKILL.md

- conversion-accessibility-polish: Improve website clarity, conversion, trust, and accessibility. Use for CTAs, forms, navigation, pricing, empty states, contrast, keyboard behavior, semantic HTML, and decision flow.
  - Skill file: conversion-accessibility-polish/SKILL.md
  - Raw: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/divyanshu-iitian/agent-website-design-skills/main/conversion-accessibility-polish/SKILL.md

## Agent Guidance

Load only the skill relevant to the current task. Read its SKILL.md first, then read referenced files only when the skill instructs you to.

Prefer:
- web-visual-direction before implementation when the visual concept is unclear.
- web-design-system when consistency, tokens, components, or interaction states are needed.
- landing-page-craft for marketing pages and conversion-focused website flows.
- responsive-ui-qa after frontend changes or when layout bugs are reported.
- conversion-accessibility-polish near the end of a build for clarity, trust, CTAs, forms, and accessibility.
